meaning: n.半神半人,受崇拜的人,小神
examples: Priesthoods based on the worship of a demigod are extremely rare.
Sadly there is no question as to whether or not a demigod can be slain.
Instead of standing up to threats, they kneel to the powerful as if before a demigod.
"When I'm walking with him, I feel like I'm walking with a demigod, especially in Japan, " says Jean-Baptiste Duzan, Renault's corporate controller.
He will always be a demigod, revered, on a pedestal, in a way that Saban and really all modern-day coaches never really will.
